title: Ilaiyaraaja has no copyright over lyrics, sound recording of En Iniya Pon Nilave song: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court has upheld an order holding that music composer Ilaiyaraaja did not hold copyright over either the lyrics or the sound recording of the iconic Tamil song En Iniya Pon Nilave.A Bench of Justices Hari Shankar and Om Prakash Shukla dismissed an appeal filed by Ilaiyaraaja against Saregama India Limited in a copyright dispute concerning the proposed recreation of the song for the Tamil film Aghathiyaa.The Bench held that under Section 2(p) of the Copyright Act, the term “musical
